targets.label: PS5
rules: Prefer standard PS5 Disc or Digital console from an authorized big-box retailer.
Bundles are allowed when the bundle value is clear.
Marketplace sellers, scalper pricing, PS5 Pro, refurb, and open-box rows are warnings, not default best buys.

targets.label: 65-inch TV
rules: Prefer mainstream mid-quality models such as QLED, Mini LED, or strong value 4K sets.
Avoid no-name marketplace rows and entry-tier TVs unless the price is clearly worth the tradeoff.

items.stock_status: Public price displayed; store-specific stock not selected
items.pickup_delivery: Live search showed ship-to-home and store-pickup controls; confirm Houston store availability before buying.
items.evidence_text: Live GameStop search on July 21 displayed Sony PlayStation 5 Console at $549.99; the page offered delivery and pickup selection controls.

items.stock_status: Public catalog price displayed; final availability requires an active session
items.pickup_delivery: PlayStation Direct page states free standard delivery; no Houston pickup path shown.
items.evidence_text: Live PlayStation Direct PS5 catalog displayed the 825 GB Digital Edition Console at $599.00; the page also displayed a session-timeout sign-in dialog, so checkout availability was not confirmed.

items.stock_status: Unavailable at the page's selected location
items.pickup_delivery: No current buy path shown on the live product page; confirm Houston availability before buying.
items.evidence_text: Live Best Buy product page displayed PlayStation 5 Slim Console model 1000039671 at $549.99, sold by Best Buy, with its purchase control marked Unavailable.

items.product_name: VIZIO 65-inch Class Quantum Series QLED Smart TV
items.pickup_delivery: Live Sam's Club listing showed shipping availability; confirm Houston pickup or delivery timing before buying.
items.evidence_text: Live Sam's Club QLED TV results displayed the VIZIO 65-inch Quantum Series 4K QLED Smart TV at $328.00, with Add to Cart and Available for Shipping shown.

items.product_name: Samsung 65-inch Class Q7FD Series 4K QLED Smart TV
items.pickup_delivery: Live Sam's Club listing showed shipping availability; confirm Houston pickup or delivery timing before buying.
items.evidence_text: Live Sam's Club QLED TV results displayed the Samsung 65-inch Q7FD Series 4K QLED Smart TV at $497.99, with Add to Cart and Available for Shipping shown.

daily_brief.summary: PS5: GameStop $549.99 for Sony PlayStation 5 Console. TV: Sam's Club $328 for VIZIO 65-inch Class Quantum Series QLED Smart TV.
data_quality_gaps: Confirm final cart total, tax, pickup/delivery timing, and seller identity before buying.
Member-only and cart-only prices are shown as warnings until checkout proof is visible.
